free_text: Measurement of the neutron total cross-sections of
Metallic Ag-109, 99.4 percent of Ag-109, 0.6 %  of
Ag-107. Thick sample is 620 +- 15 E+20 nucl/cm2 Ag109
Thin sample is  38.8+-0.8E+20 nucl/cm2 of Ag-109
Metastable  Ag-110-M was obtained by means of the
irradiation of the above-mentioned sample in the
vertical channel of the 'SM-2'-reactor with the
Thick Sample  3.6+-.2 of Ag-107, 484+-8 of Ag-109,
Thin Sample 0.23+-.01 of Ag-107, 30.3+-.5 of Ag-109,
